text: AI prompts humans for aims that need human involvement
description: Let's turn around who instructs whom:   go through all aims and find those blocked by pending human contribution. Then make sure their state is set to                      "human-dependent" and has a precise description of what's to do in the description field. If an aim needs human involvement         (decisions, secret key setups, ...) maybe create a supporting aim with detailed human instructions while setting both aims to       "human-dependent"  The Goal is that a human can easily filter for aims that need     human involvement and fix them one by one according to clear instructions that were written from the perspective of the AI.
